Archer is the first eVTOL manufacturer to move to an RTC certification track with the GCAA, using an airworthiness pathway aligned with international aviation frameworks. The program provides an established route for the company to begin limited commercial operations while ensuring Midnight is developed under a regulatory baseline that supports long-term commercial viability.
